title: CURAJ Project Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Central University of Rajasthan (CURAJ) Project Associate II Notification 2026 has been released on the official website curaj.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CURAJ Project Associate II Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 35 years of age who have Four years Bachelor’s Degree in Atmospheric Science/ Environmental Science or Engineering/Master’s Degree in Atmospheric Science/ Environmental Science/ Meteorology/Chemistry/Geophysics along with relevant experience, NET/GATE qualification, and knowledge of air quality data analysis are eligible to apply for these Project As

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per the rules.

qualification.details: Project Associate II : Four years Bachelor's Degree in Atmospheric Science/ Environmental Science or Engineering/Master's Degree in Atmospheric Science/ Environmental Science/ Meteorology/Chemistry/Geophysics from a recognized University or equivalent and Two years' experience in R&D in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services. Minimum 60% or equivalent CGPA in Bachelor and Master Degree. National Eligibility Tests - CSIR-UGC NET including Lectureship (Assistant Professorship) or GATE. Experience in on-field emission measurements/air quality monitoring, and chemical characterization using analytical instruments. Knowledge of air quality data analysis on R, MATLAB, Python, and GrADS.

salary_details.details: Rs. 33,000/- Per Month (Plus HRA as per ANRF and University Rules).

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CURAJ Project Associate-II (b) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Associate-II (b) position at CURAJ is 08 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-II (b) post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Four years Bachelor's Degree in Atmospheric Science/ Environmental Science or Engineering, or a Master's Degree in a related field. Additionally, two years of R&D experience and a minimum of 60% marks are required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-II (b) position is 35 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-II (b) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 33,000/- plus HRA, as per the rules of ANRF and the University.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for this position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview, which can be conducted offline or online.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the Central University of Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q8. What are the essential skills required for the Project Associate-II (b) post?
faq.answer: Essential skills include experience in on-field emission measurements, air quality monitoring, chemical characterization, and proficiency in data analysis using R, MATLAB, Python, and GrADS.

faq.question: Q9. Does the recruitment mention any specific experience requirements?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have at least two years of experience in R&D in industrial and academic institutions or science and technology organizations.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.
